handoff.reason: Rolling Phase-2 program promoted from STUB-XK82Z2 with deferred phases bound to STUB-QT400D, STUB-K5YBFN, STUB-XX4JBC

execution_rules.notes: Rolling plan: Phase 1 fully planned; Phases 2-4 plan_deferred=true with hard_stops approved=false — each requires explicit planning + approval after the prior phase is COMPLETED + REVIEWED. Integrator lane: land to main + push per phase.

hard_constraints: Locked 12-field ValidationReport schema: additive evidence fields only, no enum/required-field breaks
All 833 relative_target_not_in_project targets verified existing on disk (812 via .js->.ts) — fix is membership logic, not data
Operator rulings 2026-06-12 baked into deferred stubs: K5YBFN option A (tag + src-only counts), XX4JBC option A (evidence-level flag)
Integrator lane: commit to main + push per phase

decisions_log.note: integrator single-checkout lane; commits land straight on main per WO constraint
no semantic-validator runtime in executor dir; constraints checked manually: locked 12-field report untouched, additive-only fix, integrator lane honored
quick discovery executed inline: import-resolver.ts read end-to-end; bug localized to probeRelative (no .js->.ts NodeNext mapping); repo's own imports use .js suffixes

post-phase audit inline: fix additive (one probe block), no API surface change, MCP spot-checks 3/3 resolved, baseline table + CHANGELOG refreshed; two collateral findings stubbed (STUB-Z1ETZD vitest mjs collection, STUB-5WVGHD scanner nested-export)
Operator 2026-06-12: continue on coderef-core-next roadmap without per-phase approval. Applied to rolling-plan phase gates for this WO.
P2 tasks authored from discovery; additive path locked: no ImportResolutionKind/EdgeResolutionStatus enum changes; reason=node_builtin carries the disposition

Option-A ruling implemented as: evidence-level testOrigin tag (single buildEdgeRecord chokepoint) + additive ValidationReport 12->14 bump (unresolved_src_count, ambiguous_src_count) per the documented 11->12 stability precedent. Graph semantics unchanged.

plan_adjustments.summary: P1-T5 gate: 1600/1600 collected tests PASS (incl. 5 new membership tests). One test FILE uncollectable (check-header-coverage.test.ts, SyntaxError at collection) - PROVEN PRE-EXISTING via stash test (fails identically without the resolver fix); minimal repro: any vitest test importing scripts/check-header-coverage.mjs fails collection while plain node import works. Filed STUB-Z1ETZD (CODEREF-CORE). Gate accepted as PASS-with-pre-existing-note per flaky/contention-note precedent.

P1-T4 repopulate surfaced exports_match_ast stale on coderef-mcp-server.ts: scanner marks nested fn buildToolHandlers.inboundByKind exported:true (inherits parent flag); header is honest (2 real exports). Latent finding - first full populate since MCP server landed; resolver fix does not touch export extraction. Filed STUB-5WVGHD (CODEREF-CORE). header_coverage 99.24->98.85, header_stale 0->1, header_export_mismatch 0->1 in refreshed baseline are explained by this, not by the membership fix.

P2 impact larger than stub estimate (~1,100): builtin_count 1186->4622 (+3436), unresolved 20243->17484 (-2759), ambiguous 3204->2620 (-584). Receiver-allowlist additions (console/process/globalThis/Buffer/...) honestly drew from populations the audit had bucketed under prototype-method/ambiguous noise. not_in_manifest 487->21 (audit predicted ~34). Shadow-safety proven by test (project symbol beats global). No frozen-fixture updates needed - suite 1607/1607 collected green. New test files stamped with @coderef-semantic headers after a transient header_missing_count=1.

P3 shipped: evidence.testOrigin tag at the single buildEdgeRecord chokepoint + ValidationReport 12->14 additive bump (unresolved_src_count 5854, ambiguous_src_count 1290). Self-scan: 66.6% of unresolved is test-origin (audit estimated 65%). Collateral header drift caught and fixed in-phase (isTestOriginFile added to graph-builder @exports). Suite 1610/1610 collected green; locked-schema test bumped with paired stability note; MCP server tolerates pre-bump 12-field artifacts via optional fields; docs swept 12->14 across 6 files.

communication_log.message: WO created from STUB-XK82Z2 (roadmap PHASE-2.UNRESOLVED-EDGE-AUDIT). Rolling plan: P1 membership-check fix planned (7 tasks); P2-P4 deferred to STUB-QT400D/K5YBFN/XX4JBC. Discovery: 64 candidates; RAG fallback (server down).

Phase 1 COMPLETE (commit 91d8ac7, pushed): 833 -> 21 relative_target_not_in_project (812 resolved), valid_edge_count +933. Holding at phase_complete_holding per rolling-plan report-back. Next: author Phase 2 plan (STUB-QT400D) then /execute-workorder --phase=2.

Phase 2 COMPLETE: builtin classification fix (3 sub-populations: builtin imports, builtin-module receivers, JS-global callees). Continuing directly to Phase 3 (STUB-K5YBFN) per operator standing approval.
Phase 3 COMPLETE: test-origin tagging + src-only counts live (MCP validation_status returns 14 fields). Continuing to Phase 4 (STUB-XX4JBC) per operator standing approval.
